title: Harness Manifest
description: Schema for tracking the installed state of a harness in a target workspace

autoharness_home.description: Absolute path to the autoharness installation used for this install run. Enables the tuner to locate templates for drift detection.

profile_hash.description: SHA-256 of the workspace profile used during installation

config_hash.description: SHA-256 of .autoharness/config.yaml at installation time. Null if no config was present. Used by the tuner to detect intentional configuration changes.

install_preset.description: Preset used when the harness was installed

primary_stack_pack.description: Primary stack classification selected during composition

stack_packs.description: Additive stack classifications active during installation

install_layers.description: Explicit artifact-class layers composed during installation. The 'overlays' layer MUST be present when capability_packs is non-empty.

capability_packs.description: Optional capability packs enabled during installation

capability_pack_overlays.description: Structured record of which artifact classes each enabled capability pack was woven into

path.description: Workspace-relative path to the installed artifact

template.description: Name of the template used to generate this artifact

checksum.description: SHA-256 of the installed file content

variables_used.description: Map of template variable names to resolved values
